name: agentspace
description: Use when the user wants to share a local folder, file, generated artifacts, logs, screenshots, or a project workspace with a human or another agent via a link. Trigger on requests like "share this folder", "upload these files", "send me the artifacts", "give me a link", or "handoff this workspace". Fits into MCP tool workflows and automation pipelines where multiple agents need a shared data root accessible through the ascli HTTP API.
